meaning: n.&adj.(供诊断或治疗用的)放射性药物(的),放射药剂(的)
examples: This group will examine administered dosages and come up with recommended radiopharmaceutical dosages over the next year.
Objective To study the diagnostic value of quantitative analysis of radiopharmaceutical imaging of salivary gland on Sjgren's syndrome.
The general circumstances on the conception, quality of GMP and Chinese GMP for radiopharmaceutical manufacturers are introduced briefly.
